description_long: This is a three-story apartment building with a flat roof, featuring a light pink and beige brick facade. The front side has a double-door entrance with a small overhang and three vertically aligned windows on each floor, all with white trim. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the ground floor is accentuated with a beige stone base. The roof is bordered by a parapet and includes a visible HVAC unit. The building sits on a paved surface, suggesting an urban sidewalk or courtyard setting. The overall design is simple and functional, with no balconies or decorative elements.
description: A three-story, pink and beige brick apartment building with a flat roof, white-trimmed windows, and a double-door entrance, set on a paved urban surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main double-door entrance, three floors of symmetrically aligned windows, and the beige stone base.
description_view_1: Rear view with three floors of windows but no entrance, maintaining the same window alignment as the front.
description_view_2: Side view with a plain brick wall, no windows or doors, and the beige stone base visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: Side view with three vertically aligned windows and the beige stone base, similar to the front and rear but without an entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns on each visible side, with equal spacing between floors and consistent alignment across the facade.
